data.name: A01
data.value: This media name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A010
data.value: This adjustment reason name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A011
data.value: This status reason name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A012
data.value: This display text is already in use, please enter a unique display text.

data.name: A013
data.value: This request reason name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A05
data.value: This fee type name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A06
data.value: This billing template name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A07
data.value: This requestor type is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A08
data.value: This delivery method name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A09
data.value: This payment method name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A100
data.value: You have made changes that have not been saved. Click "Save && Proceed" to save changes and continue navigating to your selection. Click "Don't Save && Proceed" to discard your changes and continue navigating to your selection. Click "Cancel" to remain where you are and continue working.

data.name: A102
data.value: Proceed and no changes will be saved.

data.name: A103
data.value: Do not proceed and remain on the page.

data.name: A104
data.value: Unknown exception.

data.name: A105
data.value: Unable to load file.

data.name: A106
data.value: Unable to connect to the ROI server at {0}. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: A107
data.value: Server is busy.

data.name: A108
data.value: File not found.

data.name: A109
data.value: UI error occurred.

data.name: A110
data.value: Unsupported helper type.

data.name: A111
data.value: Argument is null.

data.name: A112
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected media type?

data.name: A113
data.value: Object not listed in grid.

data.name: A114
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected fee type?

data.name: A115
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected delivery method?

data.name: A116
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected payment method?

data.name: A117
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected adjustment reason?

data.name: A118
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected request reason?

data.name: A119
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected request status reason?

data.name: A121
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected billing template?

data.name: A122
data.value: The string is not a description or value of the specified Enum.

data.name: A123
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected requestor type?

data.name: A128
data.value: You do not have the required security rights to access ROI Export to Email. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: A129
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel the configuration changes?

data.name: A130
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected clinical system instance?

data.name: ROI.0.0.01
data.value: Seed data cannot be deleted.

data.name: ROI.1.2.00
data.value: This delivery method name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: ROI.1.2.01
data.value: Delivery method name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.2.02
data.value: Delivery method operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.2.03
data.value: Delivery method seed data name cannot be modified.

data.name: ROI.1.2.04
data.value: Delivery method name should not exceed 20 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.2.05
data.value: Delivery method URL should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.2.06
data.value: Invalid URL

data.name: ROI.1.3.00
data.value: Seed data cannot be modified.

data.name: ROI.1.3.01
data.value: Media type name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.3.02
data.value: Seed data cannot be deleted.

data.name: ROI.1.3.03
data.value: The selected media type cannot be deleted because it is assigned to a billing tier.

data.name: ROI.1.3.04
data.value: Operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.3.05
data.value: Media type name should not exceed 30 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.3.06
data.value: Media type description should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.4.01
data.value: Fee type name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.4.02
data.value: The selected fee type cannot be deleted because it is assigned to a billing template.

data.name: ROI.1.4.03
data.value: Operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.4.04
data.value: Fee type name should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.4.05
data.value: Amount format is invalid.

data.name: ROI.1.5.00
data.value: Payment method name is not unique.

data.name: ROI.1.5.01
data.value: Payment method name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.5.02
data.value: Payment method name should not exceed 20 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.5.05
data.value: Payment method description should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.6.00
data.value: Billing template name should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.6.01
data.value: Billing template name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.6.02
data.value: The selected billing template cannot be deleted because it is assigned to a requestor type.

data.name: ROI.1.6.03
data.value: Billing template operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.7.00
data.value: Number of pages should be between 1-99.

data.name: ROI.1.14.00
data.value: Number of days should be between 0-999.

data.name: ROI.1.8.00
data.value: Reason name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.8.01
data.value: Reason display text cannot be blank

data.name: ROI.1.8.02
data.value: This display text is already in use, please enter a unique display text.

data.name: ROI.1.8.03
data.value: Request reason attribute is blank.

data.name: ROI.1.8.04
data.value: Request status cannot be blank.

data.name: ROI.1.8.05
data.value: Reason name should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.8.06
data.value: Reason display text should not exceed 40 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.8.07
data.value: Reason operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.9.01
data.value: Requestor type name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.9.02
data.value: Requestor type names should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.9.05
data.value: Seed data cannot be modified.

data.name: ROI.1.9.06
data.value: Seed data cannot be deleted.

data.name: ROI.1.9.08
data.value: Requestor type operation failed.

data.name: S001
data.value: Authorization failed.

data.name: T000
data.value: Authentication failed.

data.name: T031
data.value: Id is invalid. Refresh the data and try again.

data.name: T033
data.value: Record already modified. Refresh the data and try again.

data.name: A101
data.value: Would you like to save changes made to Code Set <{0}> before accessing a new code set?

data.name: A014
data.value: This letter template name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A015
data.value: The selected file is not a valid format for a letter template. Letter template file should be Word Document (*.docx).

data.name: A016
data.value: The file path is not valid. Please verify that the path is correct or select another file.

data.name: ROI.1.11.00
data.value: Letter template of type "Other" cannot be set as default.

data.name: ROI.1.11.01
data.value: Letter template should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.11.02
data.value: Letter template name exceeds maximum length.

data.name: ROI.1.11.03
data.value: Letter template uploaded file name length exceeds maximum length.

data.name: ROI.1.11.04
data.value: Letter template process failed.

data.name: ROI.1.11.06
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected letter template?

data.name: ROI.1.11.07
data.value: File path cannot be empty.

data.name: ROI.1.11.08
data.value: Letter template type cannot be blank.

data.name: ROI.1.11.09
data.value: The selected letter template does not have document. Please upload a document for the letter type.

data.name: ROI.1.10.01
data.value: Only a single doctype can be specified per code set

data.name: ROI.1.10.02
data.value: Invalid Document Types Id.

data.name: S002
data.value: System Error.

data.name: A02
data.value: This billing tier name is already in use, please enter a unique name.

data.name: A120
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected billing tier?

data.name: ROI.1.1.01
data.value: Billing tier Name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.1.1.02
data.value: Billing tier should have a valid media type.

data.name: ROI.1.1.03
data.value: Billing tier cannot be associated to Non-MPF media type.

data.name: ROI.1.1.04
data.value: Billing tier must have at least one page tier.

data.name: ROI.1.1.05
data.value: A base charge rate must be entered. The flat rate charge must be 0 or greater. Valid characters for this field include positive numbers, a decimal point, and precision of 2 decimal places. Ex: 9.98

data.name: ROI.1.1.06
data.value: Billing tier associated to a requestor type is being deleted.

data.name: ROI.1.1.07
data.value: Seed data billing tier name cannot be modified.

data.name: ROI.1.1.08
data.value: Seed data billing tier's media type cannot be modified.

data.name: ROI.1.1.10
data.value: Amount format is invalid.

data.name: ROI.1.1.09
data.value: Billing tier name should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.1.12
data.value: Billing tier base charge should not exceed 6 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.1.13
data.value: Amount format is invalid.

data.name: ROI.1.1.14
data.value: The page numbers entered are not sequential. Please enter a page number that is 1 more than the "through page" value entered on the previous tier.

data.name: A04
data.value: The billing tier entered already exists. Please edit the page numbers to create a valid billing tier or remove the tier.

data.name: ROI.1.1.16
data.value: The page number entered is not valid. Please enter a page that is equal to or greater than the starting page.

data.name: ROI.1.1.18
data.value: The page number entered is not valid.

data.name: ROI.1.6.04
data.value: Please select at least one fee type.

data.name: ROI.1.11.10
data.value: The file is in use, please close the file before proceeding.

data.name: ROI.1.11.11
data.value: Access to a file is denied.

data.name: S003
data.value: Unable to connect Alert server

data.name: ROI.1.1.11
data.value: Billing tier operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.1.17
data.value: Amount format is invalid.

data.name: ROI.1.1.19
data.value: Media type with electronic billing tier associated with a requestor type cannot be modified.

data.name: ROI.1.10.00
data.value: Disclosure document types operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.11.05
data.value: Letter template description exceeds maximum length of 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.1.5.04
data.value: Payment method operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.7.01
data.value: Page weight operation failed.

data.name: ROI.1.9.03
data.value: Requestor type must have one MPF electronic billing tier.

data.name: ROI.1.9.04
data.value: Please select default record view.

data.name: ROI.1.9.10
data.value: Record view operation failed.

data.name: T034
data.value: Data integrity violation.

data.name: ROI.1.9.09
data.value: Requestor type billing template has more than one default.

data.value: Invalid upload url.

data.value: Invalid download url.

data.name: ROI.1.9.07
data.value: Requestor type billing tier name is not electronic.

data.value: Invalid page number.

data.name: ROI.1.5.03
data.value: Seed data payment method name cannot be modified.

data.name: ROI.1.8.08
data.value: Reason type not mentioned.

data.name: A201
data.value: You have entered a patient name that matches an existing patient in the system. Do you want to continue and save this patient?

data.name: A202
data.value: Do you really want to delete this Non-MPF patient? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ROI.3.1.02
data.value: Patient Last Name cannot be empty.

data.name: ROI.2.1.00
data.value: Requestor Name should have at least two characters

data.name: ROI.2.1.01
data.value: EPN requires 3 characters to perform the search

data.name: ROI.2.1.02
data.value: Patient SSN field should have at least 3 characters

data.name: ROI.2.1.08
data.value: Requestor search operation failed

data.name: ROI.2.1.09
data.value: Requestor invalid search criteria

data.name: ROI.2.1.10
data.value: Requestor operation failed

data.name: ROI.2.1.15
data.value: Requestor contact name should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.2.1.16
data.value: There are no Email phone types

data.name: ROI.3.1.01
data.value: Invalid Search Criteria

data.name: ROI.0.0.02
data.value: File transfer process is failed.

data.name: ROI.0.0.03
data.value: Unable to Initialize the server configuration.

data.name: ROI.3.1.03
data.value: ROI supplemental operation failed.

data.name: ROI.3.1.04
data.value: Patient last name should not exceed 256 characters.

data.name: ROI.3.1.12
data.value: ROI supplemental details cannot be null.

data.name: ROI.3.1.06
data.value: Do you really want to delete this Non-MPF patient? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: A301
data.value: You have entered a requestor name that matches an existing requestor in the system. Do you want to continue and save this requestor?

data.name: A302
data.value: Really delete this requestor? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ROI.1.11.14
data.value: File Upload Failed.

data.name: A401
data.value: Really delete this Non-MPF Document? This action cannot be undone.

data.value: Select a Document Type.

data.name: ROI.3.3.02
data.value: Select a Facility.

data.name: ROI.3.3.03
data.value: You must enter a page count that is greater than zero.

data.name: ROI.2.1.04
data.value: Requestor name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.2.1.05
data.value: Requestor type cannot be empty.

data.name: ROI.2.5.1
data.value: Requestor name search input can be empty or alphanumeric with white space and -_ characters.

data.name: ROI.2.1.07
data.value: You have requested to delete a requestor that has already been included on a request. This requestor cannot be deleted.

data.value: Date of Service cannot be empty.

data.name: ROI.3.3.04
data.value: NonMpf document has been Released

data.value: Invalid EPN prefix.

data.name: A501
data.value: You have selected to delete this request. Do you wish to continue?

data.value: Create Request Event operation failed

data.name: ROI.5.0.02
data.value: RequestId is empty

data.name: ROI.5.0.03
data.value: Event Type is empty

data.name: ROI.5.0.04
data.value: Request comment is empty

data.name: ROI.4.0.00
data.value: Request model is empty

data.name: ROI.4.0.01
data.value: Request cannot be created without a requestor.

data.name: ROI.4.0.02
data.value: Request reason cannot be empty.

data.name: ROI.4.0.03
data.value: Receipt Date cannot be empty

data.name: ROI.4.0.04
data.value: Created date is not later than or equal to Receipt Date

data.name: ROI.4.0.05
data.value: You have selected to delete this request, but this request has some released documents. So you cannot delete this request.

data.name: ROI.4.0.06
data.value: Request current reason should not be empty.

data.name: ROI.4.0.10
data.value: Search Request Operation Failed

data.name: ROI.4.0.11
data.value: Invalid Search Criteria

data.value: Invalid Pagination Data

data.name: ROI.4.0.13
data.value: Invalid DOB in Search Criteria

data.name: ROI.4.0.14
data.value: Invalid Facility in Search Criteria

data.name: ROI.4.0.15
data.value: Invalid Receipt Date in Search Criteria

data.name: ROI.4.0.07
data.value: Not a valid number

data.name: A502
data.value: The entered date is invalid. Please select a date that is equal to or earlier than the "To" date.

data.name: A503
data.value: The selected date is invalid because it is in the future. Please select a date that is no later than the current date.

data.name: ROI.4.1.03
data.value: The status of the request cannot be changed unless the documents are released.

data.name: ROI.4.1.04
data.value: Selected request status is not applicable for new request.

data.name: A303
data.value: The record(s) have already been added to the request to be released and cannot be added again.

data.name: A304
data.value: Previously released documents cannot be removed.

data.name: ROI.4.0.08
data.value: Document is already released hence can not be deleted

data.name: ROI.4.0.16
data.value: Get request count operation failed

data.name: ROI.4.1.00
data.value: Invalid status id

data.value: Status change has no reasons

data.name: ROI.4.1.02
data.value: Invalid status change

data.value: Request operation failed

data.name: ROI.4.1.06
data.value: Request encounter name is not unique

data.name: ROI.4.1.12
data.value: Documents are released requestor could not be changed

data.value: Invalid non mpf document patient id

data.name: ROI.5.0.05
data.value: Request comment exceeds maximum length.

data.value: Empty match criteria

data.value: Empty match criteria list

data.value: Match criteria list invalid

data.value: The note name must be unique. Please enter an unique name.

data.value: The entered date is invalid. Please select a date that is equal to or greater than the "From" date.

data.name: ROI.7.0.03
data.value: Released request cannot be deleted.

data.name: ROI.7.0.04
data.value: Billing operation failed.

data.name: ROI.7.2.01
data.value: Amount entered is invalid. Please enter a number greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: ROI.7.1.01
data.value: The value for pages must be greater than 0.

data.name: ROI.7.1.02
data.value: The value for copies must be greater than 0.

data.name: ROI.7.3.01
data.value: Amount entered is invalid. Please enter the amount format eg: 123456.78

data.name: ROI.7.4.01
data.value: Adjustment amount entered is invalid. Please enter the amount format eg: 123456.78

data.name: ROI.7.4.02
data.value: Payment amount entered is invalid. Please enter a number greater than 0.

data.name: SigninState.ChangePassword
data.value: You have authenticated with a default password that is now required to be changed.

data.name: SigninState.InvalidUser
data.value: You do not have the required security to access this application. Please see your system administrator.

data.name: SigninState.InvalidUserPassword
data.value: The user ID and/or password submitted are invalid. Please retry. Password is case sensitive.

data.name: SigninState.UserDisabled
data.value: Unable to login. User Account is Disabled. Please contact your System Administrator.

data.name: SigninState.UserLockedOut
data.value: Maximum sign in attempts exceeded. User Account is Locked. Please contact your System Administrator.

data.name: CurrentAndNewPasswordSame
data.value: The new password cannot be the same as your current password.

data.name: NewAndConfirmPasswordNotSame
data.value: The new passwords do not match, please re-enter.

data.name: ROI.7.0.00
data.value: Request has invalid release details.

data.name: ROI.7.0.01
data.value: Request has invalid release charges.

data.name: ROI.7.0.02
data.value: Invalid release Id.

data.name: changepasswordfailed.title
data.value: Change Password Failed

data.name: changepasswordsuccess.message
data.value: Your password has been successfully updated.

data.name: changepasswordsuccess.title
data.value: Password Updated

data.name: fileNameEmpty
data.value: File name cannot be empty and cannot contain any of the following characters '\\', '/', '*', '"', '<', '>', '|'

data.name: ROI.7.0.09
data.value: Request is already released, cannot create a PreBill.

data.name: CurrentPasswordDoNotMatch
data.value: The current password is invalid.

data.name: AuthenticationFailedException
data.value: AuthenticationFailedException: The system was unable to locate your account. Please verify your User name and Password and try again.

data.name: A505
data.value: The entered date is invalid. Please select a date that is equal to or greater than the start date.

data.name: ROI.0.0.17
data.value: Data access exception.

data.name: ROI.0.0.18
data.value: Retrieving free form facilities operation failed.

data.name: ROI.3.1.11
data.value: ROI supplemental cannot be null.

data.name: ROI.3.1.13
data.value: ROI supplemental has associated with request.

data.name: ROI.3.1.14
data.value: ROI LOV cannot be null.

data.name: ROI.3.1.16
data.value: Supplemental search criteria cannot be null.

data.name: ROI.7.0.07
data.value: Request has no release item.

data.name: ROI.7.0.08
data.value: Unable to parse the release item.

data.name: ROI.7.0.10
data.value: Letter template identifier is zero.

data.name: ROI.7.0.11
data.value: Invalid release.

data.name: ROI.7.0.12
data.value: Unable to build a pdf template from the xml content.

data.name: ROI.7.0.13
data.value: Unable to generate pdf.

data.name: ROI.7.0.14
data.value: Generate letter operation failed.

data.name: ROI.0.0.20
data.value: Alternate City accepts only AlphaNumeric and white space characters

data.name: ROI.0.0.21
data.value: The data you entered in the ZIP code field is invalid. United States ZIP codes may contain only numbers and must appear in one of the following formats: ##### or #####-####. Canadian ZIP codes may contain letters or numbers and must appear in the following format: X#X #X#.

data.value: Alternate State accepts only AlphaNumeric and white space characters

data.name: ROI.4.0.23

data.name: AU000
data.value: Access to service denied.

data.name: ROI.2.0.00
data.value: This Requestor record is currently in use by another user. Please refresh and try again to be able to make and save changes.

data.name: ROI.3.0.00
data.value: This Patient record is currently in use by another user. Please refresh and try again to be able to make and save changes.

data.value: Completed Date cannot be empty

data.value: Created date is not later than or equal to Completed Date

data.value: Patient first name should not exceed 256 characters.

data.value: Patient First Name cannot be empty.

data.value: Login Failure. Please try again.

data.name: A10

data.value:

data.name: AR000
data.value: Archiving has occurred. As a result, changes since the last Save will be lost for this request. Select OK and access the request again from Find/Create Request screen to proceed.

data.name: ROI.10.0.31
data.value: You cannot save the Date that occurred on or before January 1, 1753. Please enter the date again.

data.name: A506
data.value: The entered date is invalid. Please select a date that is equal to or earlier than the "End Date".

data.name: A507
data.value: The entered date is invalid. Please select a date that is equal to or greater than the "Start Date".

data.name: ROI.10.0.32
data.value: You cannot search for a Date that occurred on or before January 1, 1753. Please enter the date again.

data.value: Really delete this Attachment? This action cannot be undone.

data.value: Error in adding files.Please contact your system administrator
